article.title: Devastating 'Dirty Frag' exploit leaks out, gives immediate root access on most Linux machines since 2017, no patches available, no warning given — Copy Fail-like vulnerability had its embargo broken
article.summary: Dirty Frag exploit gets root on most Linux machines since 2017, no patches available
article.title_zh: 破壞性的 'Dirty Frag' 漏洞洩露，對自 2017 年以來的大多數 Linux 機器提供即時 root 存取權限，沒有可用補丁，沒有警告發佈——類似 Copy Fail 的漏洞被破壞禁令
article.summary_zh: Dirty Frag 漏洞對自 2017 年以來的大多數 Linux 機器進行 root 存取，目前沒有可用補丁。

article.title: AI data center bans are rapidly multiplying across the US — 69 jurisdictions block new builds, with four moves noted as permanent
article.summary: More jurisdictions across the United States have been enacting a data center ban, with the total number of active bans reaching 50 as of April 2026.
article.title_zh: AI數據中心禁令在美國快速蔓延——69個司法管轄區禁止新建設，其中四項被列為永久禁令
article.summary_zh: 美國越來越多司法管轄區正在實施數據中心禁令，截至2026年4月，活躍禁令總數已達50項。

article.title: The Zens Semi-Solid-State Powerbank: a modest but worthwhile battery breakthrough
article.summary: Next-generation battery technology is much like fusion power: a major breakthrough is always a year or two away. We keep being promised things like laptop batteries that can last for a month, and true wireless charging throughout a room. None of it ever materializes. However, one modest but still worthwhile breakthrough in battery tech is real and available today: solid-state powerbanks – including a new MagSafe model from Zens … more…
article.title_zh: Zens 半固態行動電源：謙遜但值得的電池技術突破
article.summary_zh: 下一代電池技術承諾帶來重大突破，而 Zens 的半固態行動電源實現了謙遜但值得的進步。

article.title: Intel CEO Who Won Over Trump and Musk Now Needs a Breakthrough
article.summary: After Lip-Bu Tan became chief executive officer of Intel Corp. in March of last year, the struggling company’s shares went nowhere for seven months while the chipmaker was getting trounced in the market for artificial intelligence.
article.title_zh: 贏得川普和馬斯克信任的 Intel CEO 現在需要突破
article.summary_zh: 自去年 3 月 Lip-Bu Tan 成為 Intel Corp. 首席執行官以來，這家陷入困境的公司股價在七個月內毫無進展，而該芯片製造商在人工智慧市場中被擊敗。

article.title: Samsung chip workers reject $340,000 one-time bonus, demand annual payouts like SK hynix's $900,000 — workers want share of AI windfall, impending 18-day strike could cost Samsung up to $11.7 billion
article.summary: Negotiations between the National Samsung Electronics Union, which represents workers in the company’s chipmaking division, and management have seemingly broken down over a single issue.
article.title_zh: Samsung 晶片員工拒絕 34 萬美元一次性獎金，要求年度支付（如 SK hynix 的 90 萬美元）— 員工要求分享AI獲利，即將進行的18天罷工可能使Samsung損失117億美元
article.summary_zh: 代表 Samsung 晶片製造部門員工的全國 Samsung 電子工會與管理層的談判似乎因單一議題而破裂。

article.title: Anthropic updates Claude Managed Agents with three new features
article.summary: Anthropic launched Claude Managed Agents last month , greatly simplifying the work required to build and deploy cloud-hosted AI agents. This week, Claude Managed Agents are becoming more capable with three new features. more…
article.title_zh: Anthropic 更新 Claude Managed Agents，推出三項新功能
article.summary_zh: Claude Managed Agents 本週新增三項功能，使其能力進一步增強。

article.title: Spotify can now save ‘Personal Podcasts’ with your calendar and more using AI agents [Video]
article.summary: Spotify is launching deeper AI agent integration with “Personal Podcasts,” which can be saved to your account with personalized information such as calendar events. more…
article.title_zh: Spotify 現可使用 AI 代理保存 'Personal Podcasts'，並整合日程提醒功能
article.summary_zh: Spotify 推出 'Personal Podcasts' 功能，利用 AI 代理根據用户日程和其他信息生成個性化播客。

article.title: This latest OnePlus phone could finally kill your battery anxiety
article.summary: TL;DR OnePlus Nord CE6 is all about battery life, with an 8,000mAh cell and 80W charging that could stretch close to 2.5 days on lighter use. It comes with a 144Hz AMOLED display, but skips HDR10+ and Dolby Vision, which feels like a noticeable cut. You get strong durability and long software support via OxygenOS 16, but compromises show up elsewhere, especially in the basic camera setup and missing features like NFC and eSIM. For a company that’s supposedly going through a rough patch , OnePlus isn’t acting like it. If anything, it’s pushing hardware harder than ever. Just weeks after rolling out the OnePlus Nord 6 , the brand is back with the OnePlus Nord CE6. If there’s a direction here, it’s hard to miss — battery life is clearly at the center of it all. The Nord CE6 packs an 8,000mAh
article.title_zh: 最新 OnePlus 手機有望終結您的電池焦慮
article.summary_zh: OnePlus Nord CE6 配備 8,000mAh 電池和 80W 快充，可在輕度使用下提供近 2.5 天的電池續航時間。

article.title: Google may already be testing a ‘deeply integrated’ agentic solution to take on OpenClaw
article.summary: TL;DR Google’s next agentic AI could already be under internal testing at the company. Codenamed “Remy,” the tool is described as a “24/7 personal agent.” After spinning down work on Project Mariner efforts, Remy may be Google’s response to OpenClaw. Right now, the question isn’t whether or not AI agents can help get work done for us on our behalf — it’s just how much we’re able to do with them. As systems reach higher and higher levels of capabilities, we’re already seeing the goalposts move, and just the other day we heard that Google was shifting development resources away from the browser-based Project Mariner and on to more OpenClaw -like systems. Now another report shines a little more light on the shape such efforts are taking. Don’t want to miss the best from Android Authority ?
article.title_zh: Google 可能已在測試深度集成的 AI Agent 解決方案以對抗 OpenClaw
article.summary_zh: Google 下一代 Agent AI 代號「Remy」可能已在內部測試，旨在成為對 OpenClaw 的回應。

article.title: Nvidia to Invest Up to $2.1 Billion in Data Center Firm IREN
article.summary: Nvidia Corp. is investing as much as $2.1 billion in the data center developer IREN Ltd. as part of a broader partnership between the two companies aimed at accelerating the construction of artificial intelligence infrastructure.
article.title_zh: Nvidia 投資 IREN 數據中心公司最多 21 億美元
article.summary_zh: Nvidia Corp. 作為與 IREN Ltd. 更廣泛合作夥伴關係的一部分，投資最多 21 億美元到該數據中心開發商，旨在加速人工智能基礎設施的建設。

article.title: These Fitbit features won’t be available in the Google Health app: Badges, sleep animals, more
article.summary: Ahead of the Google Health app rolling out next week, the company has detailed what Fitbit features are going away or significantly changing. more…
article.title_zh: Google Health 應用中將無法使用的 Fitbit 功能：徽章、睡眠動物等
article.summary_zh: Google 詳細說明了在 Google Health 應用推出後，哪些 Fitbit 功能將停用或發生重大變更。

article.title: OpenAI launches new voice intelligence features in its API
article.summary: The new features could be handy for customer service systems, but OpenAI says they have applications that work across a variety of other fields, including education and creator platforms.
article.title_zh: OpenAI 在其 API 中推出新的語音智能功能
article.summary_zh: 這些新功能可用於客戶服務系統，OpenAI 表示還有應用於教育和創作者平台等多個領域的潛力。

article.title: Voi founders’ new AI startup Pit has become the latest rising star out of Stockholm
article.summary: AI startup Pit is led by the co-founders of European scooter giant Voi and backed by a16z, which is leading the startup’s $16 million seed round.
article.title_zh: Voi 創始人的新 AI 創業公司 Pit 成為斯德哥爾摩的最新明星
article.summary_zh: AI 創業公司 Pit 由歐洲滑板車巨頭 Voi 的共同創始人領導，獲得 a16z 支持，後者正主導這家初創公司的 1600 萬美元種子輪融資。

article.title: iPhone 18 Pro’s new A20 chip  rumored to bring two major upgrades
article.summary: Every year, Apple has a new chip ready for its latest iPhones. But the A20 Pro chip for this fall’s iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone Ultra sounds like it could be extra special. Here are its two big rumored upgrades. more…
article.title_zh: iPhone 18 Pro 的新 A20 晶片傳聞將帶來兩大升級
article.summary_zh: Apple 每年為最新 iPhone 推出新晶片，而今年秋季 iPhone 18 Pro 和 iPhone Ultra 的 A20 Pro 晶片傳聞將帶來兩項重大升級。
